name: mail-finder
title: Mail Finder
description: Find the verified email address of any professional.
author: morrissimons

commands.name: mail-finder
commands.title: Find Email
commands.subtitle: Mail Finder
commands.description: Search for name and domain to find an email

commands.name: search-history
commands.title: Search History
commands.subtitle: Mail Finder
commands.description: Browse past email searches, rerun them, or clear history

commands.name: company-employees
commands.title: Browse Employees
commands.subtitle: Mail Finder
commands.description: Search by company domain to list employees grouped by department

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your Mail Finder API key (starts with mf_). Get one from your dashboard.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
